==Pirate Paradise==
Pirate Paradise is the 1st map within the [[Mysterious Sea]]. Unlock Pirate Paradise by obtaining [[Britland INTEL#Fleet Management|Fleet Management INTEL tile 8]].

Places are determined with rows and columns. Therefore, C1R4 means the 1st column and 4th row, C5R2 means the 5th column and 2nd row, and so on.

===Other Seas===
{|class=wikitable
! Pirate Paradise
! [[Bibini Bottom]]
! [[Mecha Sea]]
! [[Poseidon Temple]]
! [[Dragon Palace]]
! [[Doomsday Sea]]
|}

==Floor 1==
'''Starting Tile''' C1R6
'''Clear Cost''' 1 NAV Bronze Coin per mist

[[File:Pirate Paradise 1.5.png|200px|left]]
<tabber>
|-|Fleet Fights=
{| class="wikitable"
!Place
!Enemy
!Power
!Sailors 
!Reward
|-
|C4R1
|Pirate Fleet
|420
|56 
|Silver +9
|-
|C2R2
|Pirate Fleet
|392
| 60
|Silver +8
|-
|C5R2
|
|1,018
|66
|Gold +5
|-
|C3R3
|Pirate Fleet
|368
|64
|Silver +8
|-
|C1R4
|Pirate Fleet
|346
|69
|Silver +7
|-
|C4R5
|
|822
|53
|Gold +3
|-
|C3R6
|Pirate Fleet
|327
|73
|Silver +7
|}
|-|Snail Fights=
{| class="wikitable"
!Place 
!Enemy
!ATK
!DEF
!HP
!Weakness
!Reward
|-
|C5R2
|
|30,844
|25,981
|462,540
|ART 9,814
|NAV Gold Coin +5, Expert Scroll +5
|-
|C4R5
|
|30,490 
|25,682
|446,272
|ART 9,751
|NAV Gold Coin +3, Expert Scroll +5
|}
|-|Events=
{|class="wikitable"
|colspan="4;" style="background-color:var(--red-bg); text-align:center"|Events
|-
!style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Place
!style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Event
!style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Requirements
!style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Reward
|-
|C1R1
|Tavern
|9,800 FAME
|Gear Chest +5, Sailor +10
|-
|C4R3
|
|Treasure Hunting Lv.1
|Dragon Chest +30
|-
|C6R3
|Tavern
|9,600 FAME
|Gear Chest +5, Sailor +10
|-
|C2R4
|Lighthouse
|9,500 TECH
|?, Glue +10
|-
|C3R4
|Ancient Obelisk
| -
|Choose a skill
|-
|C5R5
|Drift Bottle
| -
|Expert Scroll +2
|}
|-|Other=
{|class="wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Sailor
|Sailor +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Flotsam<br>1 of:
|Wood +80<br>Stone +80<br>B-tads +200<br>NAV Bronze Coin +20
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Flotsam<br>1 of:
|INTEL +50<br>Green Reagent +1<br>NAV Silver Coin +1<br>Novice Scroll +1
|}
</tabber>

==Floor 2==
'''Starting Tile''' C6R1
'''Clear Cost''' 2 Bronze NAV Coins per mist

[[File:Pirate Paradise 2.5.png|200px|left]]
<tabber>
|-|Fleet Fights=
{| class="wikitable"
!Place 
!Enemy
!Power
!Sailors
!Reward
|-
|C5R1
|Pirate Fleet
|685
|65
|Silver +14
|-
|C1R2
|Sea Prison
|1,707
|109
|Gold +10
|-
|C2R2
|Pirate Fleet
|587
|77
|Silver +12
|-
|C4R2
|Pirate Fleet
|632
|71
|Silver +13
|-
|C4R4
|Pirate Fleet
|514
|89
|Silver +11
|-
|C6R4
|Pirate Fleet
|548
|83
|Silver +11
|-
|C3R5
|Pirate Fleet
|457
|101
|Silver +10
|-
|C5R5
|Pirate Fleet
|484
|95
|Silver +10
|}
|-|Snail Fights=
{| class="wikitable"
!Place
!Enemy
!ATK 
!DEF
!HP
!Weakness
! Reward
|-
|C1R2
|
|32,211
|27,118
|528,462
|ART 10,071
|NAV Gold Coin +10, Expert Scroll +5
|-
|C1R3
|Warden
|32,890
|27,638
|542,061
|ART 10,211
|Organ Slime +10, Lottery Ticket +1
|}
|-|Events=
{| class="wikitable"
! colspan="4;" style="background-color:var(--red-bg); text-align:center;" |Events
|-
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Place
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Event
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Requirements
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Reward
|-
|C1R1
|Ancient Obelisk
| -
|Choose a skill
|-
|C2R1
|School of Deep-sea Fish
|Fishing Lv.1
|Fish Cake +20, B-tads +3,000
|-
|C4R1
|Recent Ruins
|Archeology Lv.1
|[[Nefertiti Bust|<span style="color:var(--purple-text)">Nefertiti Bust</span>]] +5
|-
|C3R2
|Lighthouse
|10,000 TECH
|Tool Chest +5, Glue +10
|-
|C1R3
|Sea Prison
| -
|Snail Fight with "Warden"
|-
|C2R5
|Drift Bottle
| -
|Britland Treasure Map +3
|-
|C6R5
|School of Deep-sea Fish
|Fishing Lv.1
|Fish Cake +20, B-tads +3,000
|}
|-|Other=
{|class="wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Sailor
|Sailor +5
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Flotsam<br>1 of:
|Wood +80<br>Stone +80<br>B-tads +200<br>NAV Bronze Coin +20
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Flotsam<br>1 of:
|INTEL +50<br>Green Reagent +1<br>NAV Silver Coin +1<br>Novice Scroll +1
|}
</tabber>

==Floor 3==
'''Starting Tile''' C6R5
'''Clear Cost''' 5 Copper Coins per mist

[[File:Mysterious Sea 3.5.png|200px|left]]
<tabber>
|-|Fleet Fight=
{| class="wikitable"
!Place 
!Enemy
!Power
!Sailors 
!Reward
|-
|C1R1
|Pirate Fleet
|727
|95
|Silver +15
|-
|C4R1
|Pirate Fleet
|783
|88
|Silver +16
|-
|C5R2
|Barbarossa
|2,300
|146
|Gold +5
|-
|C1R3
|Pirate Fleet
|679
|102
|Silver +14
|-
|C3R3
|Nomadic Pirate
|2,992
|190
|Gold +15
|-
|C3R4
|Pirate Fleet
|637
|109
|Silver +13
|-
|C2R5
|Pirate Fleet
|566
|124
|Silver +12
|-
|C5R5
|Pirate Fleet
|599
|117
|Silver +12
|}
|-|Snail Fights=
{| class="wikitable"
!Place
!Enemy
!ATK
! DEF
!HP
!Weakness
! Reward
|-
|C5R2
|Thordan
|33,009
|27,738
|542,637
|ART 10,246
|NAV Gold Coin +5, Expert Scroll +5
|-
|C6R2
|Swordsman in Black
|46,778
|39,012
|1,411,014
|ART 12,652
|Demon Chest +10, Grandmaster Scroll +10, Purple Coating +10
|-
|C3R3
|
|33,127
|27,838
|543,212
|ART 10,281
|NAV Gold Coin +15, Expert Scroll +5
|}
|-|Events=
{| class="wikitable"
| colspan="4;" style="background-color:var(--red-bg); text-align:center" |Events
|-
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Place
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Event
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Requirements
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" | Reward
|-
|C3R1
|School of Deep-sea Fish
|Fishing Lv.1
|Fish Cake +?0, B-tads +2,000
|-
|C4R2
|Drift Bottle
| -
|Expert Scroll +2
|-
|C6R2
|Dinghey
|10,450 FAME
|Snail Fight with "Swordsman in Black"
|-
|C2R3
|Lighthouse
|10,300 TECH
|Tool Chest +5, Glue +10
|-
|C4R5
|Recent Ruins
|Archeology Lv.1
|[[Boy with Goose|<span style="color:var(--purple-text)">Boy with Goose</span>]] +5
|-
|C1R6
|Ancient Obelisk
| -
|Choose a skill
|-
|C3R6
|Tavern
|10,200 FAME
|Gear Chest +5, Sailor +20
|}
|-|Other=
{|class="wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Sailor
|Sailor +6
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Flotsam<br>1 of:
|Wood +80<br>Stone +80<br>B-tads +200<br>NAV Bronze Coin +20
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Flotsam<br>1 of:
|INTEL +50<br>Green Reagent +1<br>NAV Silver Coin +1<br>Novice Scroll +1
|}
</tabber>

==Floor 4==
'''Starting Tile''' C3R6
'''Clear Cost''' 10 Bronze Coin per mist

[[File:Pirate Paradise 4.5.png|200px|left]]
<tabber>
|-|Fleet Fight=
{| class="wikitable"
!Place 
!Enemy
!Power
!Sailors 
!Reward
|-
|C6R1
|Pirate Fleet
|1,313
|145
|Silver +27
|-
|C2R2
|Vadah
|4,230
|267
|Gold +20
|-
|C5R2
|Pirate Fleet
|1,219
|157
|Silver +25
|-
|C2R4
|Pirate Fleet
|1,067
|181
|Silver +22
|-
|C3R4
|Golden Hind
|3,586
|227
|Gold +8
|-
|C6R4
|Pirate Fleet
|1,138
|169
|Silver +23
|-
|C1R5
|Pirate Fleet
|949
|205
|Silver +19
|-
|C5R5
|Pirate Fleet
|1,004
|193
|Silver +21
|}
|-|Snail Fights=
{| class="wikitable"
!Place
!Enemy
!ATK
! DEF
!HP
!Weakness
! Reward
|-
|C1R2
|Guard of Armory
|33,931
|28,463
|576,429
|ART 10,455
|Gear Chest +10, Corvette Blueprint
|-
|C2R2
|
|34,220
|28,670
|591,334
|ART 10,485
|NAV Gold Coin +20, Expert Scroll +5
|-
|C3R4
|
|33,806
|28,357
|575,804
|ART 10,421
|NAV Gold Coin +8, Master Scroll +5
|}
|-|Events=
{| class="wikitable"
| colspan="4;" style="background-color:var(--red-bg); text-align:center" |Events
|-
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Place
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Event
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Requirements
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" | Reward
|-
|C3R1
|Ancient Obelisk
| -
|Choose a skill
|-
|C1R2
|Royal Armory
| -
|Snail Fight with "Commander"
|-
|C2R3
|Tavern
|10,400 FAME
|Gear Chest +5, Sailor +20
|-
|C6R3
|Recent Ruins
|Archeology Lv.1
|Nefertiti Bust +5
|-
|C5R4
|School of Deep-sea Fish
|Fishing Lv.1
|Fish Cake +50, B-tads +2,000
|-
|C6R5
|Drift bottle
| -
|Expert Scroll +2
|-
|C1R6
|School of Deep-sea Fish
|Fishing Lv.1
|Fish Cake +20, B-tads +3,000
|}
|-|Other=
{|class="wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Sailor
|Sailor +7
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Flotsam<br>1 of:
|Wood +80<br>Stone +80<br>B-tads +200<br>NAV Bronze Coin +20
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Flotsam<br>1 of:
|INTEL +50<br>Green Reagent +1<br>NAV Silver Coin +1<br>Novice Scroll +1
|}
</tabber>

==Floor 5==
'''Starting Tile''' C1R1
'''Clear Cost''' 1 Silver Coin per mist

[[File:Pirate Paradise 5.5.png|200px|left]]
<tabber>
|-|Fleet Fights=
{| class="wikitable"
!Place 
!Enemy
!Power
!Sailors 
!Reward
|-
|C2R1
|Pirate Fleet
|1,769
|195
|Silver +36
|-
|C5R1
|Pirate Fleet
|1,916
|179
|Silver +39
|-
|C2R3
|Pirate Fleet
|1,533
|227
|Silver +31
|-
|C6R3
|Pirate Fleet
|1,643
|211
|Silver +33
|-
|C1R4
|Illusion
|4,677
|295
|Gold +10
|-
|C4R4
|Pirate Fleet
|1,437
|243
|Silver +29
|-
|C3R5
|Pirate Fleet
|1,353
|260
|Silver +28
|-
|C6R5
|Queen Annie Revenge
|5,669
|358
|Gold +25
|-
|C1R6
|Pirate Fleet
|1,278
|276
|Silver +26
|}
|-|Snail Fights=
{| class="wikitable"
!Place
!Enemy
!ATK
! DEF
!HP
!Weakness
! Reward
|-
|C1R4
|Captain Singleton
|34,830
|29,186
|609,590
|ART 10,603
|NAV Gold Coin +10, Expert Scroll +5
|-
|C6R5
|Black Beard
|35,508
|29,741
|629,599
|ART 10,721
|NAV Gold Coin +30, [[Ship in a Bottle|<span style="color:var(--orange-text)">Ship in a Bottle</span>]]
|}
|-|Events=
{| class="wikitable"
| colspan="4;" style="background-color:var(--red-bg); text-align:center" |Events
|-
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Place
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Event
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" |Requirements
! style="background-color:var(--red-bg)" | Reward
|-
|C3R2
|Drift Bottle
| -
|Britland Treasure Map +3
|-
|C6R2
|Fountain of Eternal Youth
|Treasure Hunting Lv.2
|Purple HP-Fungus +1, Magic Potion +10
|-
|C5R3
|Prophet Hut
|10,700 CIV
|Master Scroll +1, Orange Reagent +1
|-
|C2R4
|Tavern
|10,600 FAME
|Gear Chest +5, Sailor +25
|-
|C4R5
|School of Deep-sea Fish
|Fishing Lv.1
|Fish Cake +20, B-tads +3,000
|-
|C3R6
|Ancient Obelisk
| -
|Choose a skill
|}
|-|Other=
{|class="wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Sailor
|Sailor +8
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Flotsam<br>1 of:
|Wood +80<br>Stone +80<br>B-tads +200<br>NAV Bronze Coin +20
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Flotsam<br>1 of:
|INTEL +50<br>Green Reagent +1<br>NAV Silver Coin +1<br>Novice Scroll +1
|}
</tabber>

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Realm]]
[[Category:Britland]]
